raw.subject: Your Tuscaloosa page caught my eye
raw.body:
Hi,

I love the autumn vibes on your page! The pumpkin patch posts are a great way to engage with the community in Tuscaloosa.

But I noticed you don't have your own website yet, which might mean some customers who search for restaurants online might not find you right away.

I thought it would be interesting to imagine how your Facebook posts could be organized in a more cohesive way. I sketched out a simple homepage idea based on the photos and posts you share. It would include a menu hero with some of the delicious barbecue options you feature, as well as a section for hours and a map to help customers find you.

https://sites.damianbasilio.dev/preview/sweet-bonez-alabama-tuscaloosa

No pressure, but building it out is a straightforward project with a flat fee for local businesses - reply or a quick call if you'd like to discuss more.
